TextView.android:text: Multi-layered access control for the vault.
Mask vault as a working calculator decoy
Hide app icon from launcher drawer
Wipe vault on entering emergency code
Take photo on failed login attempt
Record IP and Geo-location on failure
Instantly purge all encrypted metadata and key headers. Irreversible process.
Need to back up your master recovery key?
Your Amarok instance is currently secure and operating under active automation schedulers.
Show persistent notifications when vault is exposed
Exclude Amarok from Android app recents deck
Bypass passcode verification if vault is visible
Do not display snackbar/toast alerts on hide action
Auto lock vault when device screen turns off
Direct integration with Android system server via hooks
Bypass secondary hide steps under Xposed
